articles.title: Dr. Romania B. Pratt Penrose
articles.author: Annie Wells Cannon
articles.notes: Searched all 5 provided PDF pages thoroughly. Found advertisements for various businesses, table of contents page, and a poem titled 'Could We Hear?' by Helen M. Livingston, but the article 'Dr. Romania B. Pratt Penrose' by Annie Wells Cannon is not present on any of these pages. The article may be on different pages not included in this set.

articles.title: Mantled Tree
articles.complete_text:
Mantled Tree

By Vesta Pierce Crawford

I saw a tree mantled in snow,
Its branches bent with winter's load;
Yet through the white I seemed to know
The life that in its heart still glowed.

So may it be with human hearts
When sorrow's mantle wraps them round;
Though winter's chill the joy departs,
Life's warmth within may still be found.

The tree will cast its snowy dress
When spring returns with warming sun;
So hearts that now know loneliness
May find their winter days are done.
articles.author: Vesta Pierce Crawford
articles.notes: Found complete poem on page 723 as indicated in the table of contents. The poem consists of three stanzas comparing a snow-covered tree to human hearts enduring sorrow.

articles.title: Theology and Testimony - Authority to Act in the Name of God
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (54-58) contain different content including an editorial about Dr. Robert H. Bradford, a record-breaker section about Sister Anne Jackson, a 'Do Not Waste Time' section, and a Lesson Department section titled 'Theology and Testimony' about 'First Aids to Goodness' covering free agency among the Nephites. The specific article 'Authority to Act in the Name of God' was not found in these pages.

Allred and content about Relief Society work and child welfare, but no article titled 'Teachers' Topic - The Beatitudes' appears on these pages. The article may be on different pages not included in this set.
